final_prompt.prompt:
Create a marketing poster for a WeChat public account article cover featuring a new fragrance product launch.

Style/medium: premium editorial design, high-end magazine cover aesthetic, sophisticated minimalism
Composition: centered layout, title placed in visual center, balanced negative space on all sides
Subject: fragrance bottle or abstract scent visualization as secondary element, elegant typography as primary focus
Scene/backdrop: refined gradient or textured background suggesting autumn warmth and sophistication
Lighting/mood: soft diffused studio lighting, luxurious and contemplative atmosphere
Color palette: warm autumn tones (amber, burnt orange, deep burgundy) with cream or off-white accents, harmonious and muted
Text (verbatim): "染秋 - 秋意染染 时光留香"
Constraints: title must be the dominant visual element; design must work at 900x500px thumbnail size; maintain readability on mobile screens
Avoid: cluttered elements competing with title, generic stock photo aesthetic, oversaturated colors, decorative frames that distract from content
